items.title: Starbucks Korea sacks CEO over controversial 'Tank Day' promotion
items.dek: Starbucks withdrew the campaign for its drink tumblers after many said it referenced a bloody crackdown.
items.body: Starbucks withdrew the campaign for its drink tumblers after many said it referenced a bloody crackdown.

items.title: Tasmanian government apologises over stolen body parts scandal
items.dek: An investigation found that 177 human specimens from dozens of bodies were secretly kept by a museum.
items.body: An investigation found that 177 human specimens from dozens of bodies were secretly kept by a museum.
items.author: IriLine Desk
